rationale: The paper focuses on "end-to-end autonomous driving" (robotics/vehicle control), which is an entirely different domain from the user's question regarding "autonomous scientific research" (LLM agents for literature review and hypothesis generation). Although both share the phrase "end-to-end autonomous," the underlying mechanisms, variables, and empirical populations are distinct, satisfying the rejection rule for off-domain topics sharing only homonym keywords.
